entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop known as Pennisetum glaucum

entities.name: PENNISETUM GLAUCUM
entities.description: The scientific name for pearl millet

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC-NUCLEAR MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A system of male sterility controlled by the interaction of cytoplasmic and nuclear genes

entities.name: A4 SYSTEM
entities.description: A known cytoplasmic-nuclear male sterility system in pearl millet

entities.name: A5 SYSTEM
entities.description: A newly identified cytoplasmic-nuclear male sterility system in pearl millet

entities.name: LARGE-SEEDED GENE POOL
entities.description: A gene pool from which a new CMS source was identified

entities.name: MALE STERILITY
entities.description: The condition where a plant cannot produce functional pollen

entities.name: FERTILITY
entities.description: The ability of a plant to produce functional pollen and seeds

entities.name: POLLEN-SHEDDING SCORE
entities.description: A scoring system used to evaluate the level of pollen release

entities.name: SELFED SEEDSET
entities.description: A measurement of the percentage of seeds produced through self-pollination

entities.name: RESTORER LINES
entities.description: Inbred lines used to restore fertility in male-sterile hybrids

entities.name: TOPCROSS HYBRIDS
entities.description: Hybrids produced by crossing a specific line with diverse composites
